testcase.classname: Navia Online Trading Market Post Market Testing
testcase.name: Login Navia
testcase.system-out: Given User Navigate to Navia................................................passed When User Click login with client code......................................passed And User Enter Client Code..................................................passed And User Enter Password....................................................passed And User Click Agree CheckBox...............................................passed And User Click Login button.................................................passed And User Click Otp Verification and enter manualy...........................passed And User Click Login Again..................................................passed

testcase.classname: Navia Online Trading Market Post Market Testing
testcase.name: User Check - Charts- functionality
testcase.system-out: When Navigate to home page..................................................passed And User Click the Watch List...............................................passed And User Select scrip "S&P BSE SENSEX"......................................passed And User Click Watch List Again.............................................passed And User mouse over the scrip "Nifty 50"....................................passed And User Click the Charts...................................................passed And User Click the Candles Icon.............................................passed And User Choose Candle "candle".............................................passed And User Click the Mintues..................................................passed And User Choose One Minute..................................................passed And Verify One Minute Feed Connection Value and Wait One Minute Very Feed Connection Changes.passed And User Click the Five Minute..............................................passed And Verify Five Minute Feed Connection Valuebb..............................passed And User Click One Day......................................................passed And Verify One Day Feed Connection Value and Wait One Minute Very Feed Connection Changes.passed

testcase.classname: Navia Online Trading Market Post Market Testing
testcase.name: Payin add money in navia

testcase.classname: Navia Online Trading Market Post Market Testing
testcase.name: User Check - POP UP- functionality
testcase.system-out: When Navigate to home page..................................................passed And User click the search box...............................................passed And User Search any "HDFCBANK" Script.......................................passed And User Mouse Over and Add a Script........................................passed And User POP Up Message Appear Verify POP UP................................passed

testcase.classname: Navia Online Trading Market Post Market Testing
testcase.name: Add and Remove Any Script and Verify

testcase.classname: Navia Online Trading Market Post Market Testing
testcase.name: User Check - F&O- functionality
testcase.system-out: When Navigate to home page..................................................passed When User Search "Banknifty" in Searchbox...................................passed And User Click Futures......................................................passed And User mouse over "BANKNIFTY" and click add icon..........................passed And Symbol Has been Added Successfully Notification Shown...................passed And User Click Clear in search box..........................................passed And User Click "BANKNIFTY"..................................................passed And User Click F&O..........................................................passed And User Click Cancel button in Ready Made Pop up...........................passed And User Click LTP..........................................................passed And User Verify the Fluctuating.............................................passed

testcase.classname: Navia Online Trading Market Post Market Testing
testcase.name: User Check - Save Strategy- functionality
testcase.system-out: When Navigate to home page..................................................passed When User Search "Banknifty" in Searchbox...................................passed And User Click Futures......................................................passed And User mouse over "BANKNIFTY" and click add icon..........................passed And Symbol Has been Added Successfully Notification Shown...................passed And User Click Clear in search box..........................................passed And User Click "BANKNIFTY"..................................................passed And User Click F&O..........................................................passed And User Click Cancel button in Ready Made Pop up...........................passed And User Click LTP..........................................................passed And User Select any Call LTP Buy............................................passed And User Select any Put LTP Sell............................................passed And User Click Save Strategy................................................passed And User enter Strategy Name "testdata36"...................................passed And User Click Save.........................................................passed And User Click Strategy Message ok..........................................passed And User Click Place Order..................................................passed

testcase.classname: Navia Online Trading Market Post Market Testing
testcase.name: User Check - Ready Made- functionality
testcase.system-out: When Navigate to home page..................................................passed When User Search "Banknifty" in Searchbox...................................passed And User Click Futures......................................................passed And User mouse over "BANKNIFTY" and click add icon..........................passed And Symbol Has been Added Successfully Notification Shown...................passed And User Click Clear in search box..........................................passed And User Click "BANKNIFTY"..................................................passed And User Click F&O..........................................................passed And User Click Cancel button in Ready Made Pop up...........................passed And User Click LTP..........................................................passed And User Select any Call LTP Buy............................................passed And User Select any Put LTP Sell............................................passed And User click read made....................................................passed And User Choose Ready made Strategy categories "Bearish"....................passed And User Select Strategy under categories "Put Ratio Back Spread"...........passed
